creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #8)

I actually didn't know https://github.com/edbrowse/edbrowse exists.

The official website https://edbrowse.org/ had CMB/edbrowse like git repo. Of course now it is changed. 

Moreover I used send my patches to CMB/edbrowse. I just noted github redirects https://github.com/CMB/edbrowse to https://github.com/edbrowse/edbrowse. 
Clearly the repo has been migrated, I didn't know this github feature.

Of course, now we can change CMB/edbrowse to edbrowse/edbrowse.
